plays.summary: It's 36°F at first pitch — cold air kills the ball and generally helps pitchers maintain grip and command. Suppressed run environment. Starters are evenly matched (Shane Smith 4.08 / Jacob Misiorowski 3.85 xFIP), and 20mph wind blowing In from CF tilts under. Model has 7.4, market is at 8.0 — under by -0.6 runs.

Tarik Skubal is at 3.14 xFIP — elite — going up against a near league average SDP lineup (102 wRC+). Tough spot for SDP's bats. The park (PF 95) gives pitchers an extra edge. Model has 7.5, market is at 7.0 — under by +0.5 runs.

Paul Skenes is at 3.12 xFIP — elite — going up against a near league average NYM lineup (106 wRC+). Tough spot for NYM's bats. The park (PF 94) gives pitchers an extra edge. 13mph wind blowing Out to CF adds an over tilt pulls the other way, but not enough to flip the lean. Model has 7.6, market is at 7.0 — under by +0.6 runs.

no_plays.summary: Light Drizzle in the forecast makes run totals unreliable here — weather games carry too much variance to project confidently. Skip this one.
The park (PF 106) pushes toward the over while sp_avg counters in the other direction — the model nets out at 8.9 runs with no clear dominant force. Pass.

transactions.description: Colorado Rockies placed RHP McCade Brown on the 15-day injured list retroactive to March 25, 2026.
